description: Phase 39: QuantVerse - Metaverse & Spatial Computing App. Create apps/quantverse/ with 3D virtual worlds, avatars, spatial audio, virtual meetups/events, commerce (virtual shops, NFTs, digital assets), and creator tools (world builder, physics engine).
steps: Create apps/quantverse/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/realtime, @quant/ai, @quant/payments, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantverse/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quantverse/backend/app.ts following createApp pattern with routes for worlds, avatars, events, commerce, creator

Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/world.service.ts - WorldService class: createWorld, joinWorld, leaveWorld, getWorldState, updateWorldPhysics, spawnEntity, destroyEntity, listPublicWorlds, setWorldRules
Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/avatar.service.ts - AvatarService class: createAvatar, customizeAvatar, equipItem, getAvatarState, animateAvatar, setExpression, getInventory, tradeItem

Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/spatial-audio.service.ts - SpatialAudioService class: initAudioContext, updateListenerPosition, addAudioSource, removeAudioSource, setAudioZone, muteParticipant, getAudioState

Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/events.service.ts - EventsService class: createEvent, scheduleEvent, joinEvent, leaveEvent, startConcert, startConference, getEventAttendees, recordEvent, streamEvent
Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/commerce.service.ts - VirtualCommerceService class: createShop, listItems, purchaseItem, mintNFT, transferAsset, getMarketplace, createAuction, bidOnAuction

Create apps/quantverse/backend/services/world-builder.service.ts - WorldBuilderService class: createTerrain, placePrefab, setLighting, configurePhysics, addInteraction, exportWorld, importWorld, collaborateOnWorld
Create apps/quantverse/backend/routes/worlds.ts, routes/avatars.ts, routes/events.ts, routes/commerce.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantverse/backend/__tests__/world.service.test.ts - Tests for world creation, join/leave, entity management, physics
Create apps/quantverse/backend/__tests__/avatar.service.test.ts - Tests for avatar customization, inventory, trading
Create apps/quantverse/backend/__tests__/commerce.service.test.ts - Tests for shops, NFT minting, auctions
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantverse/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
WorldService manages 3D world lifecycle with physics and entities
AvatarService handles customization, equipment, and trading
EventsService manages virtual meetups, concerts, and conferences
VirtualCommerceService enables shops, NFTs, and auctions
WorldBuilderService provides terrain, prefab, lighting, and physics tools
All services use zod for validation
Unit tests pass for world, avatar, and commerce services
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantverse/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests

blocked_reason.detail: User explicitly requested to stop adding new apps. Instruction is to fix existing TypeScript errors, make the build pass, and improve existing apps rather than adding more scope. QuantVerse app creation cancelled per user direction.
